title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 329.034 - Shampooing — no license required, when
text:
329.034.  Shampooing — no license required, when. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the division of professional registration shall not require any person who engages solely in shampooing under the supervision of a licensed barber or cosmetologist to be licensed as a barber or cosmetologist.  For purposes of this section, "shampooing" means the act of washing or cleansing hair with shampoo for compensation.
(L. 2021 H.B. 273)
